title: Teal Main Menus
description: Changes The Main Menus And Hotbar Of Minecraft to be Teal
body:
# Have You Ever Wanted Your Game To Be Teal? ### Well, Now It Can Be: **Welcome To Teal Main Menus! The Pack That Makes Menus Teal** ‎ ## **_This Pack Changes 10 Things About The UI:_**
Click here to view them 1. Button Textures Are Tinted To Be Teal 2. Slider Textures Are Tinted To Be Teal 3. The Accessibility Button And Lock Difficulty Button Are Now Tinted Teal 4. The Hotbar Selector Is rounded and Tinted Teal 5. The Hotbar Slots Are Rounded And Tinted Teal 6. The Left Hand And right Hand Off-Hand Slots Are Rounded And Tinted Teal 7. The Background Texture For The Options Menu is An Teal Color Gradient 8. All Inventory And Block UI's Are Now Teal Colored 9. All Armor Hud Mods For Versions 1.21.4 Through To 1.21.11 Are Teal Colored
### Check out my other resource pack!
